pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.7.18 to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and Jakarta EE namespace changes.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and uses Jakarta EE namespaces; Spring Boot 2.x is incompatible with Java 21 features and Jakarta EE.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 1.8 to 21 to target the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run on Java 21; targeting 1.8 prevents use of Java 21 features and may cause compatibility issues with libraries requiring newer Java.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.xml.bind:jaxb-api with jakarta.xml.bind:jakarta.xml.bind-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.xml.bind is removed in Java 11+ and Spring Boot 3 uses Jakarta EE namespaces; code using JAXB will fail to compile or run without the Jakarta API.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add jaxws-rt dependency to provide JAXB implementation at runtime.
pom.xml.why_exists: JAXB API alone is insufficient; an implementation is required at runtime for JAXB operations to function.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add jakarta.mail-api dependency to replace javax.mail for Jakarta EE compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.mail is removed in Java 11+ and Spring Boot 3 uses Jakarta EE namespaces; code using JavaMail will fail to compile or run without the Jakarta API.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace Apache HttpClient 4.x with HttpClient 5.x to align with Spring Boot 3 and Java 21 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Apache HttpClient 4.x is deprecated and may have compatibility issues with Spring Boot 3 and Java 21; HttpClient 5.x is the supported version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace commons-lang 2.x with commons-lang3 to align with modern Apache Commons library.
pom.xml.why_exists: commons-lang 2.x is deprecated and may have compatibility issues with modern libraries; commons-lang3 is the supported version.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/App.java.general_idea: Replace deprecated Locale constructor with the new Locale.of factory method introduced in Java 21.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/App.java.why_exists: The Locale(String, String) constructor is deprecated for removal in Java 21, and relying on deprecated APIs causes compilation warnings or errors depending on compiler settings; the new API is the standard replacement.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/config/WebSecu.general_idea: Migrate Spring Security configuration from deprecated method-based DSL to lambda-based DSL required by Spring Security 6.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/config/WebSecu.why_exists: The methods `authorizeRequests()`, `antMatchers()`, and the old `formLogin()`/`logout()` chaining syntax are removed in Spring Security 6, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/Album.j.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/Album.j.why_exists: The javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.x; using it causes a compile-time error (package not found) on the target JDK/runtime.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/Artist..general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE namespace jakarta.persistence.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/Artist..why_exists: The javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (and thus Spring Boot 3 / Java 21 stacks), causing a compile-time 'package does not exist' error.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/BaseEnt.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/BaseEnt.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/Lyrics..general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/Lyrics..why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' errors on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/Media.j.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/Media.j.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/PlayHis.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/PlayHis.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.persistence does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3).

src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/Playlis.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/Playlis.why_exists: The javax.persistence package was removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (and Spring Boot 3.x), causing a compile-time 'package does not exist' error if not updated.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/Playlis.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/Playlis.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/Queue.j.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/Queue.j.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/Role.ja.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/Role.ja.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/Song.ja.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/Song.ja.why_exists: The javax.persistence package was removed from the classpath in Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ environments, causing a compile-time 'package does not exist' error.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/SongLik.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/SongLik.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/SongRec.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/SongRec.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/Tag.jav.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/Tag.jav.why_exists: The javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; using it causes ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/User.ja.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/User.ja.why_exists: The javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.x; using it causes a ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime, or a compile error if the old API jar is not present.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/UserArt.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/UserArt.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/exception/Glob.general_idea: Migrate JPA exception import from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/exception/Glob.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing a compile error: package javax.persistence does not exist.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/model/dto/Pass.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 16+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/model/dto/Pass.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID field in a serializable class must be annotated with @Serial in Java 16+.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/model/dto/Role.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 16+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/model/dto/Role.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID field in a serializable class must be annotated with @Serial in Java 16+.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/model/request/.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 16+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/model/request/.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID field in a serializable class must be annotated with @Serial in Java 16+.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/repository/cus.general_idea: Migrate JPA imports from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/repository/cus.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' errors on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/service/impl/C.general_idea: Migrate transactional annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/service/impl/C.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.transaction does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; the class relies on the jakarta.transaction package.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/utils/CommonAp.general_idea: Migrate HTTP client imports from the legacy Apache HttpClient 4.x package structure to the new Apache HttpClient 5.x (HC5) package structure.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/utils/CommonAp.why_exists: The old classes (org.apache.http.*) are removed or incompatible in the new library version; code fails to compile with 'package does not exist' errors.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/utils/HttpClie.general_idea: Update imports from Apache HttpClient 4.x to Apache HttpClient 5.x package structure.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/utils/HttpClie.why_exists: The old package names (org.apache.http) do not exist in the new library version, causing a compile error: package org.apache.http.impl.client does not exist.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/utils/HttpDele.general_idea: Update import statement to use the new package structure of Apache HttpClient 5 (HC5) which is required for Spring Boot 3.x compatibility.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/utils/HttpDele.why_exists: The class org.apache.http.client.methods.HttpEntityEnclosingRequestBase does not exist in Apache HttpClient 5; using the old import causes a compilation error (cannot find symbol).

src/main/java/com/javaweb/utils/SendEmai.general_idea: Migrate javax.activation imports to jakarta.activation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/utils/SendEmai.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.activation does not exist in Java 21/Spring Boot 3 environment.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/utils/SendEmai.general_idea: Migrate javax.mail imports to jakarta.mail to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/utils/SendEmai.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.mail does not exist in Java 21/Spring Boot 3 environment.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/utils/SendEmai.general_idea: Update Authenticator class reference from javax.mail to jakarta.mail.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/utils/SendEmai.why_exists: Compile error: class javax.mail.Authenticator does not exist.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/utils/SendEmai.general_idea: Update DataHandler class reference from javax.activation to jakarta.activation.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/utils/SendEmai.why_exists: Compile error: class javax.activation.DataHandler does not exist.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/view/LoginPage.general_idea: Migrate HTTP client imports from Apache HttpClient 4.x to Apache HttpClient 5.x (HC5) to align with Spring Boot 3 dependencies.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/view/LoginPage.why_exists: The old `org.apache.http` classes are removed or incompatible with the new Spring Boot 3/Java 21 stack which uses `org.apache.hc.client5` and `org.apache.hc.core5`.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/view/LoginPage.general_idea: Update status code retrieval to use HC5 API `getCode()` instead of `getStatusLine().getStatusCode()`.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/view/LoginPage.why_exists: The `getStatusLine()` method is removed or changed in HttpClient 5; `getCode()` is the new standard accessor for the status code.
